title: Provide vehicle loss assessments and identify repair requirements
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide vehicle loss assessments and identify repair requirements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for vehicle assessment

pcs.text: Assessment information is gathered1.2 Assessment information is reviewed and interpreted1.3 Materials, resources and safety equipment are located and checked for safe use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assessment information is gathered1.2 Assessment information is reviewed and interpreted1.3 Materials, resources and safety equipment are located and checked for safe use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assessment information is gathered1.2 Assessment information is reviewed and interpreted1.3 Materials, resources and safety equipment are located and checked for safe use.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for vehicle assessment

elements.title: Inspect vehicle

pcs.text: Vehicle assessment process is determined and followed2.2 Vehicle to be inspected is located2.3 Safety requirements are read and complied with2.4 Vehicle is inspected in line with insurance claim requirements and workplace policies and procedures2.5 Preferred dismantling and inspection methods are determined that conform to workplace policies and procedures and vehicle manufacturer, component supplier, and legal requirements2.6 Dismantling and inspection methods are negotiated and agreed with the repair estimator in a fair and transparent manner2.7 Damage and faults to vehicle system and component are determined2.8 Required outsourcing to specialist services is determined
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Vehicle assessment process is determined and followed2.2 Vehicle to be inspected is located2.3 Safety requirements are read and complied with2.4 Vehicle is inspected in line with insurance claim requirements and workplace policies and procedures2.5 Preferred dismantling and inspection methods are determined that conform to workplace policies and procedures and vehicle manufacturer, component supplier, and legal requirements2.6 Dismantling and inspection methods are negotiated and agreed with the repair estimator in a fair and transparent manner2.7 Damage and faults to vehicle system and component are determined2.8 Required outsourcing to specialist services is determined?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Vehicle assessment process is determined and followed2.2 Vehicle to be inspected is located2.3 Safety requirements are read and complied with2.4 Vehicle is inspected in line with insurance claim requirements and workplace policies and procedures2.5 Preferred dismantling and inspection methods are determined that conform to workplace policies and procedures and vehicle manufacturer, component supplier, and legal requirements2.6 Dismantling and inspection methods are negotiated and agreed with the repair estimator in a fair and transparent manner2.7 Damage and faults to vehicle system and component are determined2.8 Required outsourcing to specialist services is determined.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect vehicle

elements.title: Determine vehicle repair action

pcs.text: Preferred repair method for vehicle system and components is selected that conforms to workplace policies and procedures and vehicle manufacturer, component supplier, and legal requirements3.2 Preferred repair methods for paint, trim and accessories are selected that conform to workplace policies and procedures and vehicle manufacturer, component supplier, and legal requirements3.3 Job procedures are determined that use exchanged or recycled parts as appropriate3.4 Repair methods are communicated and agreed to with repairer and/or specialist services3.5 Estimated cost of repairs is calculated3.6 Settlement action is decided and agreed to with repairer and/or specialist services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Preferred repair method for vehicle system and components is selected that conforms to workplace policies and procedures and vehicle manufacturer, component supplier, and legal requirements3.2 Preferred repair methods for paint, trim and accessories are selected that conform to workplace policies and procedures and vehicle manufacturer, component supplier, and legal requirements3.3 Job procedures are determined that use exchanged or recycled parts as appropriate3.4 Repair methods are communicated and agreed to with repairer and/or specialist services3.5 Estimated cost of repairs is calculated3.6 Settlement action is decided and agreed to with repairer and/or specialist services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Preferred repair method for vehicle system and components is selected that conforms to workplace policies and procedures and vehicle manufacturer, component supplier, and legal requirements3.2 Preferred repair methods for paint, trim and accessories are selected that conform to workplace policies and procedures and vehicle manufacturer, component supplier, and legal requirements3.3 Job procedures are determined that use exchanged or recycled parts as appropriate3.4 Repair methods are communicated and agreed to with repairer and/or specialist services3.5 Estimated cost of repairs is calculated3.6 Settlement action is decided and agreed to with repairer and/or specialist services.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine vehicle repair action

elements.title: Prepare assessment report

pcs.text: Repairs are authorised where assess and authorise instructions are included in assessment information4.2 Where assess without prejudice is included in assessment information a settlement amount is determined and documented4.3 Recommendations are documented as required by industry and organisation4.4 Assessment report is completed, including either authorised estimated cost of repairs or settlement amount
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repairs are authorised where assess and authorise instructions are included in assessment information4.2 Where assess without prejudice is included in assessment information a settlement amount is determined and documented4.3 Recommendations are documented as required by industry and organisation4.4 Assessment report is completed, including either authorised estimated cost of repairs or settlement amount?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repairs are authorised where assess and authorise instructions are included in assessment information4.2 Where assess without prejudice is included in assessment information a settlement amount is determined and documented4.3 Recommendations are documented as required by industry and organisation4.4 Assessment report is completed, including either authorised estimated cost of repairs or settlement amount.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Prepare assessment report

elements.title: Complete post-assessment administration

pcs.text: Assessment report is submitted according to workplace policies and procedures5.2 Repairer invoice is compared against authorised cost estimate5.3 Discrepancies between invoice and authorised costs are investigated where applicable following industry codes and legislative requirements5.4 Payment of invoice is validated where the invoice and authorised costs are confirmed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assessment report is submitted according to workplace policies and procedures5.2 Repairer invoice is compared against authorised cost estimate5.3 Discrepancies between invoice and authorised costs are investigated where applicable following industry codes and legislative requirements5.4 Payment of invoice is validated where the invoice and authorised costs are confirmed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assessment report is submitted according to workplace policies and procedures5.2 Repairer invoice is compared against authorised cost estimate5.3 Discrepancies between invoice and authorised costs are investigated where applicable following industry codes and legislative requirements5.4 Payment of invoice is validated where the invoice and authorised costs are confirmed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete post-assessment administration

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
